plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs to reduce risk.
Trim concentrated positions like SPY and CRWD.
Increase allocation to income-focused QQQI.
Add a high-quality tech name like GOOGL.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with reduced leverage and concentration.
conservative.read: This plan targets ~1.5% monthly return with low drawdowns. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration risk. Expect slower growth due to a larger cash buffer.

plan: Trim leveraged ETF SOXL to a minimal position.
Reduce concentration in SPY and CRWD.
Increase allocation to income-focused QQQI.
Add new positions in strong scanner setups like NET and SMH.
This plan balances growth with risk reduction, lowering leverage and concentration.
balanced.read: This plan targets ~2.5% monthly return with moderate growth. It aims for risk-first growth by trimming leverage and concentration. Potential for higher drawdowns than conservative.

plan: Trim SPY and QQQI to free up capital.
Add leveraged ETF SPXL and strong tech SMH.
Initiate new positions in high-scoring scanner setups DDOG and RDDT.
This plan aggressively pursues growth by increasing leverage and concentration.
Expect higher potential returns but also significantly larger drawdowns and leverage decay.
aggressive.read: This plan targets ~4% monthly return, accepting higher risk. It leans into leverage and concentrated high-scoring setups. Significant potential for large drawdowns and losses due to leverage and daily rebalancing of leveraged ETFs.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs and high-beta single names.
Eliminate exposure to volatile sectors like semiconductors.
Significantly increase allocation to income ETF QQQI.
Add broad index SPY for stability and potential distributions.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly income and capital preservation.
income.read: This plan targets ~1% monthly return, focusing on income and low drawdowns. It prioritizes reliable distributions over growth. NAV can still fall in market downturns, but the focus is on income generation.
